decision_surfaces.public_safe_note: Decision context questions only; no decision execution or irreversible action is authorized.
Assumption snapshot questions only; assumptions are not treated as evidence or readiness proof.
Option-set questions only; no roadmap commitment, deadline promise, or delivery commitment is recorded.
Constraint-check questions only; deployment, money, legal, customer, and secret blockers remain active.
Evidence-reference questions only; no private path, secret, customer, provider, account, or reviewer identity is recorded.
Risk stop-rule questions only; no incident readiness, support coverage, or operational coverage is claimed.
Review-cadence questions only; no support cadence, delivery date, deadline promise, or schedule readiness is claimed.
Next-action selection questions only; no staging, commit, publication, spending, filing, invitation, or deployment is authorized.

next_action: continue journaling local decisions; do not execute decisions, authorize irreversible action, commit to a roadmap, promise deadlines, delegate authority, make customer commitments, claim legal authority, form a company, file a patent, spend money, publish externally, or deploy
